pages.text_content:
LASER SAFETY TRAINING ACKNOWLEDGMENT
The following material has been presented to attending laser safety officers, operations
managers, technicians, and all personnel working with lasers for the purpose of providing
quality laser safety training for the operation, maintenance and service related the safe use
of lasers and the regulations to which (insert Company Name) adheres to. The following
information was included in your Laser Safety Training:
Title Description of Materials
Intro Includes laser definitions,
acknowledgement of training, safety
disclaimer
Articles about Laser Safety Informative articles relating to laser safety
Laser Biological Hazards Information about biological hazards
related to lasers
Outdoor Laser Safety Includes guidelines/forms for safe use of
lasers outdoors
Governing Agency Contact Information Contacts for Federal, State and Local
governing agencies
Reports/Record Keeping Regulatory reporting and record keeping
Standards and Regulations Review of national, international regulations
and where to purchase standards
Training Material helpful for laser safety training
On Site Training Observation/Evaluation Trainees are observed and evaluated in the
field and/or onsite
This document is to be signed and will serve as acknowledgement of receipt of Laser Safety
Training provided by (insert Company Name) and that the material has been reviewed and
understood.
______________________________________ _______________________________
Signature Date
_______________________________________ _______________________________
Print name Title
Organization for which training was conducted:
______________________________________
Email:____________________________________________________________________
